name: Sponge Cake II
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat egg yolks until thick.
2. Add salt, lemon juice, and grated rind to the yolks.
3. In a separate bowl, combine sugar and water. Cook over medium heat until the syrup reaches 236°F (118°C).
4. Slowly pour the hot syrup into the egg mixture in a fine stream while whisking continuously.
5. Whip egg whites with cream of tartar until they form stiff peaks.
6. Carefully fold the egg white mixture into the yolk mixture.
7. Sift the cake flour and salt together, then add to the batter. Fold gently until well combined.
8. Pour the batter into an un-oiled tube pan.
9. Bake in a slow oven (325°F/160°C) for about 1 hour, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
